snapshears.configuration.title: SnapShears Configuration
konfig.config.snapshears.title: SnapShears Configuration
snapshears.config.info.common.text: Gameplay settings for sheep snapping range, color matching, bonus wool, and compatible shearing items.
snapshears.config.info.snapping.text: Snapping settings control which nearby sheep are included when a falling shear combo lands.
snapshears.config.info.drops.text: Drop settings control extra wool from sheep sheared by the burst after the first target.
snapshears.config.info.items.text: Item settings decide which held items can trigger SnapShears behavior.
snapshears.config.radius.info: Higher values catch sheep farther away from the first target. Lower values keep combos tighter and easier to predict.
snapshears.config.only_same_color.info: When enabled, bursts only include sheep matching the first sheep's wool color. Players can also hold sneak while snapping for this behavior temporarily.
snapshears.config.bonus_wool.info: Extra wool dropped by each additional sheep sheared by the burst. The first targeted sheep uses normal shearing drops.
snapshears.config.shears.info: Accepts item ids and item tags. Prefix tags with #, such as #c:tools/shear.
